# filterBy

**Instance Property**

An array of predicate dictionaries used to determine whether a record matches the query.

## Declaration

```swift
attribute Object[] filterBy;
```

## Discussion

For details see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/DataManagement/Conceptual/CloudKitWebServicesReference/QueryingRecords.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015240-CH5] in [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/DataManagement/Conceptual/CloudKitWebServicesReference/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015240]
